title: platea axillaris
side_effects: Platea axillaris can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and digestive issues. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Long-term use of Platea axillaris without proper guidance may also cause hormonal imbalances, affecting menstrual cycles and fertility in some individuals. Moreover, using the plant's extracts without consulting a healthcare professional can lead to interactions with medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
